description: Stable llmparty agent tool definitions. This file is the cross-language source of truth for tool names, descriptions, input schemas, and output schemas.

tools.name: llmparty_create_session
tools.title: Create llmparty session
tools.description: Start a new llmparty agent session. Use this when work should continue in a separate long-running agent session.

client_type.description: Agent client type for the new session. Defaults to the current llmparty session client type when available.

workspace.description: Workspace path for the new session. Defaults to the current llmparty workspace when available.

initial_message.description: Optional first message to submit to the new session as its initial task.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata attached to the created session.

session_id.description: Identifier of the created llmparty session.

session.description: External API session view returned by llmparty.

initial_turn.description: Initial turn view when initial_message was provided, otherwise null.

tools.name: llmparty_send_message
tools.title: Send llmparty message
tools.description: Send a message to a llmparty session. Use this to delegate work to another session or continue work in an existing session.

message.description: Message text to submit to the target session.

delivery_policy.description: Delivery behavior. after_idle queues the message until the session is idle; interrupt_now requests interruption of the active turn before dispatching this message.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata attached to the inbox message and resulting turn.

message_id.description: Identifier of the queued llmparty inbox message.

inbox_message.description: External API inbox message view returned by llmparty.

tools.name: llmparty_exit_session
tools.title: Exit llmparty session
tools.description: Ask llmparty to terminate the current agent session gracefully. Use this when this agent session should stop running.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for requesting self-exit.

session_id.description: Identifier of the terminated llmparty session.

session.description: External API session view returned by llmparty after termination.
